findings.title: Duplicate gflag parsing logic added in a second CLI command
findings.impact: The new logs command reimplements procfs cmdline decoding and --flag/-flag value parsing that stop.py already carries for worker process flags. Future changes to worker flag syntax or procfs parsing now have to be remembered in multiple places, and the two implementations can silently drift.
findings.fix: Move the shared process-argv and gflag-value lookup into a CLI utility or BaseCommand helper, then have both logs and the existing worker lifecycle command use that helper.

findings.title: Design spec documents a different log path than the implementation
findings.impact: The spec says the command locates <log-dir>/<address>.log, while cli/logs.py resolves log_dir plus log_filename or process name with the .INFO.log suffix. Readers using the design as the maintenance reference will look for or preserve the wrong naming contract.
findings.fix: Update the design doc to describe the implemented log path resolution order and final <log_dir>/<log_filename-or-process-name>.INFO.log naming.
